issue.title: Release gate: check-release-readiness.mjs — block tagging a release whose issues didn't go through the workflow

successCriteria.description: checkReleaseReadiness(tikiPath, version) returns ok for a fully-shipped release and reports specific failures for each missing invariant (archived+audited plan, history membership, version parity, changelog, zero reconcile drift)
The CLI exits 0 on pass and 1 on fail with a human-readable report
release.md (both mirrors) runs the gate before git tag and halts on non-zero; release.yml runs it in the pre-deploy gate so the build matrix is blocked on failure
A source-scan guard test fails if the gate invocation is removed from release.md or release.yml
pnpm build + pnpm -C packages/framework test (incl. commands-sync) clean

phases.title: check-release-readiness.mjs (function + CLI) + unit test
phases.content:
Create scripts/check-release-readiness.mjs (Node built-ins only; ESM, mirror version-bump.mjs's __dirname/root resolution). Export `checkReleaseReadiness(tikiPath, version)` returning `{ ok: boolean, failures: string[] }`, and a CLI: read version from process.argv[2], resolve tikiPath to <root>/.tiki, run the check, print a human-readable report, `process.exit(ok ? 0 : 1)`.

Checks (each pushes a specific string to failures on violation):
1. Load release def from `.tiki/releases/{version}.json` else `.tiki/releases/archive/{version}.json` (try both; normalize the version with/without leading 'v' for the filename). If neither exists -> failure 'release def not found'. Extract issues[].number.
2. Per issue N: a plan exists at `.tiki/plans/archive/issue-N.json` OR `.tiki/plans/issue-N.json`; parse it; assert `audited === true`. Missing plan or audited!==true -> failure naming the issue.
3. Per issue N: appears in state.json `history.recentIssues[].number`. Missing -> failure.
4. Version parity: read the 5 files and extract each version, compare to the release version (strip leading 'v' on both sides). Mirror version-bump.mjs extraction: package.json / apps/desktop/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json / packages/framework/.claude-plugin/plugin.json via JSON.parse(.version); apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml via /^version = "(.*)"/m; .tiki/.framework-version via trim. Any mismatch -> failure naming the file + its version.
5. Changelog: `.tiki/releases/{version}-changelog.md` exists (active or archive). Missing -> failure.
6. Reconcile drift: dynamically `import()` reconcile from packages/framework/scripts/reconcile-state.mjs (relative to root), call `reconcile(tikiPath, { dryRun: true })`, assert `.changes.length === 0`. Wrap in try/catch — if the import/call throws, push a WARNING (not a hard failure) so the gate is robust if reconcile is unavailable.

Add packages/framework/__tests__/check-release-readiness.test.mjs (node:test) importing the function via `../../../scripts/check-release-readiness.mjs`. Build temp .tiki fixtures: (a) a fully-shipped release (def + archived audited plans + history entries + matching version files + changelog) -> ok:true, failures empty; (b) variants each missing ONE invariant (no audited flag / not in history / version mismatch / missing changelog / missing plan) -> ok:false with the matching failure. Use temp dirs like the other framework tests.
verification: scripts/check-release-readiness.mjs exports checkReleaseReadiness + has a CLI with 0/1 exit
all six checks implemented; reconcile-drift is a soft warning on import failure
node:test fixtures: complete release passes; each missing invariant fails with its message
pnpm -C packages/framework test passes (new test green)
phases.summary: scripts/check-release-readiness.mjs: exported checkReleaseReadiness(tikiPath,version) + CLI (exit 0/1/2). 6 checks: release def present, per-issue archived+audited plan, per-issue in history.recentIssues, 5-file version parity (mirrors version-bump extraction), changelog present, reconcile dry-run drift (SOFT/warning if unavailable). +7 node:test fixtures (complete passes; each broken invariant fails). framework tests 61 pass.

phases.title: Wire the gate into release.md (both mirrors) + release.yml
phases.content:
release.md is mirrored — edit BOTH packages/framework/commands/release.md AND .claude/commands/tiki/release.md identically (commands-sync.test.mjs byte-compares them). In the <release-shipping> section, add a step BEFORE 'Create git tag': run `node scripts/check-release-readiness.mjs {version}` and, on non-zero exit, HALT the release (do not tag) — same block-on-failure language as the pre-ship hook. Place it right after the 'Back up state' step.

In .github/workflows/release.yml, add a step to the `test` job (the 'Pre-deploy gate (core tests)' job that the `release` matrix already `needs:`), AFTER the existing checks: name 'Release readiness gate', run `node scripts/check-release-readiness.mjs "${VERSION}"` where `VERSION` is `${{ github.event.inputs.tag || github.ref_name }}` (handles both tag-push and workflow_dispatch). Because the build matrix `needs: test`, a readiness failure blocks all installer builds. Keep it as the LAST step in the test job so the cheaper checks fail first.
verification: both release.md mirrors invoke check-release-readiness.mjs before git tag and halt on non-zero (byte-identical — commands-sync passes)
release.yml test job runs the gate as its last step with VERSION from the tag/input
release matrix still needs: test (so the gate blocks the build)
phases.summary: Wired gate into both release.md mirrors (appended to step 2, before git tag, HALT on non-zero) + release.yml test job (Release readiness gate step, VERSION from tag/input, last step; release matrix needs:test so it blocks builds). commands-sync 61/0 (mirrors byte-identical). LIVE-validated: node check-release-readiness.mjs v0.9.1 -> OK exit 0 (real shipped release passes all checks). NOTE: gate covers workflow-adherence, NOT the post-archive status footgun (that is tiki_doctor archivedButActive).

phases.title: Source-scan guard test + final gate
phases.content: Add packages/framework/__tests__/release-readiness-guard.test.mjs (node:test, same pattern as command-transition-coverage.test.mjs): assert that BOTH release.md mirrors contain a `check-release-readiness.mjs` invocation, AND that .github/workflows/release.yml contains a `check-release-readiness.mjs` step. Fail with a clear message if any is missing (encodes the 'don't silently drop the gate' bug class). Final gate: pnpm build clean; pnpm -C packages/framework test clean (incl. commands-sync byte-parity of the two release.md mirrors + the new guard).
verification: release-readiness-guard.test.mjs fails if the gate call is removed from either release.md mirror or release.yml
pnpm -C packages/framework test clean (commands-sync + transition-coverage + new guard)
phases.summary: Added release-readiness-guard.test.mjs: asserts both release.md mirrors + release.yml invoke check-release-readiness.mjs + the script exists/exports the fn (4 tests). Final gate: framework tests 65 pass (61+4), pnpm build clean.
